mapper.select: SELECT symbol, calculated_at, signal_version, integrated_score, integrated_label, tone, confidence, summary, valuation_score, valuation_label, quality_score, quality_label, growth_score, growth_label, stability_score, stability_label, earnings_score, earnings_label, analyst_score, analyst_label, news_score, news_label, momentum_score, momentum_label, risk_score, risk_label, institution_score, institution_label, reasons_json, cards_json, source_freshness_json, raw_json FROM stock_signal_latest WHERE symbol = #{symbol}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO stock_signal_latest ( symbol, calculated_at, signal_version, integrated_score, integrated_label, tone, confidence, summary, valuation_score, valuation_label, quality_score, quality_label, growth_score, growth_label, stability_score, stability_label, earnings_score, earnings_label, analyst_score, analyst_label, news_score, news_label, momentum_score, momentum_label, risk_score, risk_label, institution_score, institution_label, reasons_json, cards_json, source_freshness_json, raw_json ) VALUES ( #{symbol}, #{calculatedAt}, #{signalVersion}, #{integratedScore}, #{integratedLabel}, #{tone}, #{confidence}, #{summary}, #{valuationScore}, #{valuationLabel}, #{qualityScore}, #{qualityLabel}, #{growthScore}, #{growthLabel}, #{stabilityScore}, #{stabilityLabel}, #{earningsScore}, #{earningsLabel}, #{analystScore}, #{analystLabel}, #{newsScore}, #{newsLabel}, #{momentumScore}, #{momentumLabel}, #{riskScore}, #{riskLabel}, #{institutionScore}, #{institutionLabel}, #{reasonsJson}, #{cardsJson}, #{sourceFreshnessJson}, #{rawJson} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE calculated_at = VALUES(calculated_at), signal_version = VALUES(signal_version), integrated_score = VALUES(integrated_score), integrated_label = VALUES(integrated_label), tone = VALUES(tone), confidence = VALUES(confidence), summary = VALUES(summary), valuation_score = VALUES(valuation_score), valuation_label = VALUES(valuation_label), quality_score = VALUES(quality_score), quality_label = VALUES(quality_label), growth_score = VALUES(growth_score), growth_label = VALUES(growth_label), stability_score = VALUES(stability_score), stability_label = VALUES(stability_label), earnings_score = VALUES(earnings_score), earnings_label = VALUES(earnings_label), analyst_score = VALUES(analyst_score), analyst_label = VALUES(analyst_label), news_score = VALUES(news_score), news_label = VALUES(news_label), momentum_score = VALUES(momentum_score), momentum_label = VALUES(momentum_label), risk_score = VALUES(risk_score), risk_label = VALUES(risk_label), institution_score = VALUES(institution_score), institution_label = VALUES(institution_label), reasons_json = VALUES(reasons_json), cards_json = VALUES(cards_json), source_freshness_json = VALUES(source_freshness_json), raw_json = VALUES(raw_json)
